title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY / Tel Aviv (Global, distributed)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, plus strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer who can build flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, fintech/B2B SaaS sweet spot, Salesforce expertise aligns perfectly, and distributed model with Tel Aviv HQ matches Omri's location flexibility and likely timezone familiarity.
ai_opener: Omri here—saw Finout's Series C and your expansion into revenue ops leadership. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS RevOps across fintech and enterprise, I've built the exact Salesforce-first revenue stacks and cross-functional cadences that drive $30M+ ARR growth. Your distributed model between NY and Tel Aviv resonates with how I work best—would be worth a conversation about bringing structure and predictability to your revenue engine.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, the revenue intelligence platform, is hiring a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations. The role redesigns territory models for global scalability, partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition, and maintains territory mapping in tools like Fullcast and Salesforce. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS GTM models and segmentation, strong analytical skills with Excel/SQL/BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS GTM knowledge, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy and analytics-driven operations are core RevOps competencies, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform is a natural fit for a senior RevOps executive seeking meaningful impact.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've followed Gong's evolution as a revenue intelligence leader, and I'm impressed by how you're solving for territory optimization at scale. With 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps—including territory modeling, Salesforce administration, and GTM segmentation strategy—I'm confident I can help you redesign territory composition to drive predictable, scalable growth. I'd love to discuss how my experience translating sales strategy into operational systems aligns with your Territory Strategy & Operations mandate.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed, cash-flow-positive SaaS platform serving 5,000+ nonprofits, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Operations or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong SQL and API skills, CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience.

Slight concern: nonprofit sector differs from typical SaaS/Fintech verticals, and role emphasizes SQL/API skills over strategic RevOps leadership—a slight step down from his seniority level.

Instrumentl's approach to serving nonprofits with technical rigor resonates—I'm particularly interested in how you're leveraging AI across the revenue stack and would explore whether my systems-thinking background can accelerate your GTM infrastructure.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck, a cybersecurity intelligence company, is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager. The role builds executive-level dashboards covering pipeline health, conversion rates, forecasting, bookings, and churn/expansion, while designing scalable revenue processes across the full customer lifecycle. Requires 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Systems within a B2B SaaS environment, hands-on Salesforce or HubSpot administration, strong knowledge of SaaS metrics (ARR, ACV, sales velocity, NRR, churn), and GTM tech stack integration experience.

I'd welcome exploring how I can help VulnCheck establish the operational foundation to accelerate your growth trajectory.

title: GTM Engineer

description: Own how Theator shows up in the market. Turn product and engineering outcomes into market momentum, demand, and qualified leads. Translate complex AI surgical platform capabilities into simple outcome-driven stories. Own channel strategy: LinkedIn, email, partnerships, communities, events. AI fluency required — actively use AI to create leverage. High autonomy, fast-moving startup.
score_reason: Strong match — Growth Marketing Lead at AI healthtech startup in Tel Aviv. High autonomy, AI-native, full-funnel ownership. Israel-based.
ai_opener: Omri here — turning complex product capabilities into clear market momentum is exactly what I do. At Theator specifically, I'm drawn to the challenge of making surgical AI impossible to ignore in a market where credibility and proof points are everything.
